title: CAMPS - 211info
text: MONMOUTH- INDEPENDENCE FAMILY YMCA CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth camps, including both overnight and day camps. Day camp locations are offered at multiple sites throughout the community. 425 Gwinn Street E Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Most activities for ages 1st grade-10th grade Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 838-4042 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 838-4042 Main phone Main phone (503) 838-4042 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Scholarships are available. DOCUMENTS: If applying for scholarship, income verification is required. AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 3:30pm-8:30pm, Saturday 10am-2pm Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - LIVESTRONG AT THE YMCA SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MONMOUTH- INDEPENDENCE FAMILY YMCA
